de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

Class StatementSVWrapper

  • java.lang.Object
    • recoder.java.JavaSourceElement
      • recoder.java.JavaProgramElement
        • recoder.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
          • recoder.java.statement.JavaStatement
            • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.StatementSVWrapper

    KeYRecoderExtension, SVWrapper, Serializable, Cloneable, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, Statement, ModelElement

extends JavaStatement
implements KeYRecoderExtension, SVWrapper

      • getChildAt

        public ProgramElement getChildAt(int index)
        Returns the child at the specified index in this node's "virtual" child array
        Specified by:
        getChildAt in interface NonTerminalProgramElement
        Parameters:
        index - an index into this node's "virtual" child array
        Returns:
        the program element at the given position
        Throws:
        ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is out of bounds

      • getChildPositionCode

        public int getChildPositionCode(ProgramElement child0)
        Specified by:
        getChildPositionCode in interface NonTerminalProgramElement

      • replaceChild

        public boolean replaceChild(ProgramElement p,
                            ProgramElement q)
        Replace a single child in the current node. The child to replace is matched by identity and hence must be known exactly. The replacement element can be null - in that case, the child is effectively removed. The parent role of the new child is validated, while the parent link of the replaced child is left untouched.
        Specified by:
        replaceChild in interface NonTerminalProgramElement
        Parameters:
        p - the old child.
        q - the new child.
        Returns:
        true if a replacement has occured, false otherwise.
        Throws:
        ClassCastException - if the new child cannot take over the role of the old one.

      • setSV

        public void setSV(SchemaVariable sv)
        sets the schema variable of sort statement
        Specified by:
        setSV in interface SVWrapper
        Parameters:
        sv - the SchemaVariable
